content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(allowskew30only)
C: "rule:expMs<nowMs=>401" ∧ skew30only ∧ boundarysafe ∧ nolooop
H: "edge(-30s)badcmp"
P: cmp->expMs<nowMs-30000 → keep401else
V: edge(-30s) ∧ edge(-31s_401)
R: ! bc ∧ ! reg_t
A: min_fix+reg_test

[AUDIT]
Fix allowskew30only, preserve "rule:expMs<nowMs=>401", skew30only, and add a regression test for the 30-second grace window with boundary at minus 30 seconds.
